case_title: ANDREW COHEN VS. ALINA BUSTINZA LOPEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,500.00 FILED BY COHEN, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ALINA BUSTINZA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED FEB-28-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ALINA BUSTINZA
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-13-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANDREW COHEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALINA BUSTINZA LOPEZ IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $2628.55 TO THE PLAINTIFF; CHECK TENDERED IN COURT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE MAY 13TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
